TextView.android:text:
Nutrition Essentials

1. Eat Whole Foods
Prioritize unprocessed foods like grains and legumes.

2. Include Lean Protein
Eat chicken, fish, beans, or tofu for muscle repair.

3. Load Up on Greens
Fill half your plate with leafy vegetables.

4. Healthy Fats
Include avocados, nuts, and olive oil in your diet.

5. Watch Portion Sizes
Use smaller plates to manage calorie intake.

6. Limit Added Sugars
Reduce intake of sweets and sugary beverages.

7. Fiber is Key
Eat whole fruits and oats for better digestion.

8. Mindful Eating
Chew slowly and pay attention to fullness cues.

9. Reduce Sodium
Season with herbs and spices instead of extra salt.

10. Balanced Macros
Aim for a mix of carbs, proteins, and fats every meal.
